name: Bali Bliss
description: Enjoy Ubud temples, rice terraces, and Seminyak beaches in Asia. Includes hotel & breakfast.

name: Maldives Dream Escape
description: Overwater bungalow, snorkelling, sunset cruises in Asia. All-inclusive luxury package.

name: Thailand Adventure
description: Street food tours in Bangkok, island hopping in Phuket, Asia. Budget-friendly & action-packed.

name: Sri Lanka Heritage
description: Explore ancient ruins, tea plantations, and wildlife safaris in Asia. A cultural deep dive.

name: Tokyo Tech & Tradition
description: Experience the neon lights of Shinjuku and the serene temples of Kyoto in Asia. JR Pass included.

name: Himalayan Heights
description: Trekking in the Annapurna range, temple visits, and mountain flight to see Everest in Asia.

name: Vietnam Discovery
description: Cruise through limestone karsts, explore ancient streets, and enjoy world-class street food in Asia.

name: Singapore City Lights
description: Gardens by the Bay, Sentosa Island, and Marina Bay Sands experience in Asia.

name: European Explorer (Europe)
description: Three iconic cities in one trip across Europe. Guided tours, 4-star hotels, and airport transfers.

name: Swiss Alps Retreat
description: Mountain railways, fondue evenings, and breathtaking views of the Matterhorn in Europe.

name: Greek Island Hopping
description: Ancient history in Athens followed by sunsets and white-washed villages in the Cyclades, Europe.

name: Icelandic Fire & Ice
description: Blue Lagoon, Northern Lights hunting, and the Golden Circle waterfalls and geysers in Europe.

name: Italian Foodie Tour
description: Wine tasting in Tuscany and pasta making classes in the culinary heart of Italy, Europe.

name: London & Edinburgh
description: Royal palaces, historic castles, and the scenic train ride through the English countryside in Europe.

name: Amsterdam Canals
description: Bicycle tours, art museums, and romantic canal cruises in Europe.

name: New York City Pulse
description: Times Square, Central Park, Broadway shows, and Top of the Rock views in America.

name: Grand Canyon Adventure
description: Hiking, helicopter tours, and camping under the stars in the National Park, America.

name: Rio Carnival Spirit
description: Christ the Redeemer, Copacabana beach, and vibrant samba nightlife in South America.

name: Inca Trail Trek
description: A bucket-list journey through the Andes to the lost city of the Incas in South America.

name: Canadian Rockies
description: Turquoise lakes, glaciers, and wildlife spotting in North America's most stunning mountains.

name: Costa Rica Eco-Tour
description: Rainforest zip-lining, volcanic hot springs, and sloth spotting in Central America.

name: Dubai Luxury Getaway
description: Burj Khalifa, desert safari, luxury shopping, and fine dining experience in the Middle East.

name: Egyptian Pyramids
description: The Great Pyramids, Sphinx, and a luxury cruise down the Nile River in Africa.

name: Serengeti Safari
description: The Big Five, luxury tented camps, and the Great Migration experience in Africa.

name: Moroccan Medinas
description: Spice markets, Sahara desert glamping, and intricate Moorish architecture in Africa.

name: Cape Town & Wine
description: Table Mountain, penguin colonies, and world-class vineyards in South Africa.

name: Sydney & Great Barrier Reef
description: Opera House, Bondi Beach, and snorkelling in the world's largest coral reef, Oceania.

description: Milford Sound cruise, bungee jumping, and Lord of the Rings filming locations in Oceania.

name: Fiji Island Paradise
description: Crystal clear waters, kava ceremonies, and ultimate relaxation in a private resort, Oceania.
